verdicts.action: Fix crashes and error messages to improve stability.
evidence: R001: «it shuts down and it's show me unfortunately instagram has been stopped»
R008: «When I tap on something, it isn't loading and says "something went wrong"»
R042: «crashes more than the original Instagram»
verdicts.comment: Multiple direct reports of crashes and error messages.

verdicts.action: Add dark/night mode as most requested feature.
evidence: R002: «you should at least add dark mode in it ,it would less strain my eyes»
R003: «No dark theme provide»
R010: «dark mode is still missing»
verdicts.comment: Many users explicitly request dark mode.

verdicts.action: Reduce lag and improve loading speed, especially for feeds and stories.
evidence: R012: «every single action require a loading bar before it opens»
R018: «Everything loads so slowly»
R053: «Lags too much»
verdicts.comment: Numerous performance complaints about lag and slow loading.

verdicts.action: Implement missing features: stories polls, video upload, voice messages, and reels toggle.
evidence: R033: «couldn't vote on stories etc.»
R056: «we can't upload videos»
R013: «It doesn't support voice messages»
R003: «no reel videos option»
verdicts.comment: Direct mentions of each missing feature.

verdicts.action: Fix bugs: split screen issues, emoji squares, autoplay settings, and post ordering.
evidence: R005: «During split screen only Instagram Lite and Facebook Lite have issue that it only cover 60% of screen»
R034: «the emojis used in the lite version is different from my phone's system emoji, causing me to see squares»
R057: «please don't autoplay the video feed on timeline.»
R026: «older post always stay on top so for newer post you have to scroll down»

verdicts.action: Improve navigation and feed refresh mechanism.
evidence: R010: «When you refresh the feed it doesn't get refreshed»
R053: «The feeds never get refreshed . You just have to scroll down and when you click refresh still you see the same feeds.»
R014: «Who ever uses full screen mode... the bottom portion where the nav bar stays is blank»
verdicts.comment: Feed refresh and navigation issues reported.

verdicts.action: Add data saver mode and option to disable video autoplay.
evidence: R025: «Give data saver mode to loas images in very low quality»
R058: «Instagram Lite App Play Store will add three new options to the new update 1. "Data Saver"...»
R059: «One of the most annoying issue that I have faced since using Instagram is it's video autoplay.»
verdicts.comment: Explicit requests for data saver and disabling autoplay.

verdicts.action: Ensure compatibility with system emojis and proper display.
evidence: R034: «the emojis used in the lite version is different from my phone's system emoji, causing me to see squares»
R040: «Butt the Emoji is the problem . It's different then my keyboard's emoji .»
R027: «Photos are cropped»
verdicts.comment: Emoji incompatibility and display issues reported.

summary: All eight recommendations are directly supported by user complaints, with multiple evidence for each.
